title: Compliance: rust/lichen-cli/src/commands.rs key storage
description: Policy: 06-security.md §15.2. File: rust/lichen-cli/src/commands.rs. Status: CONCERN. Lines 188-190: key generate without -o prints seed to stdout. Has warning but allows it. Seed bytes zeroized after hex conversion (line 163). Hex string zeroized before drop (line 195).
notes: Links to epic: echd (Security Compliance Audit)
